sections.title: Consent and Trust
sections.short: Informed consent as an ongoing process.
sections.content:
# Consent
**Informed consent** is a process, not a form.
Use &Checklist|consent_checklist&.

consent_checklist.title: Consent checklist
consent_checklist.content:
## Five steps
Context, risk, right to refuse, contact, revision.

sections.title: Power and Vulnerability
sections.short: Map power asymmetry between crew and subjects.
sections.content:
# Power
Assess harm and benefit continuously.
Open &Risk cases|risk_cases&.

risk_cases.title: Risk cases
risk_cases.content:
## Typical risk
Recording people in distress without support.

sections.title: Editing and Representation
sections.short: Editing choices shape meaning and fairness.
sections.content:
# Editing
Keep context intact.
Open &Bias control|bias_control&.

bias_control.title: Bias control
bias_control.content:
### Prompt
Is this fair and accurate?

sections.title: Post-release Impact
sections.short: Prepare post-premiere safety and communication plans.
